name: t-img
description: T-IMG image hosting on Cloudflare Pages and Telegram Bot API

scripts.ci-test: concurrently --kill-others --success first "npm start" "wait-on http://localhost:8080 && npm test"
scripts.start: npx wrangler pages dev ./ --kv "img_url" --port 8080 --compatibility-date=2026-07-18 --binding BASIC_USER=local_admin --binding BASIC_PASS=local_development_only --persist-to ./data
